name: Truck-kun Sends You to a World of Amazons, Tomboys, MILFs & Femboys, Welcome to the Matriarchy
description:
After Truck-kun does its thing, you wake up in a parallel Earth where men are rare, women have evolved, and society revolves around reproduction. Your new life starts now.

You died. Then you woke up somewhere... else.

In 2020, a virus outbreak killed 90% of Earth's male population and triggered permanent genetic changes in women. Six years later, you've been isekai'd into this matriarchal world where everything you knew has been flipped upside down.

Men are now rare (only 10% of the population), protected by law, and treated like precious resources. Women have evolved into distinct categories—each with their own roles, bodies, and desires. Society revolves around cooperation, reproduction, and a sex-positive culture that would make your old world blush.

The Women You'll Meet:

Mommies (25%) - Extreme hourglass figures, massive breasts that produce valuable milk, thick thighs, huge asses, wide hips. Nurturing, sweet, maternal energy. They work as caretakers, nurses, teachers, and homemakers.

Amazons/Tomboys (30%) - Tall (5'10"-6'5"), muscular yet curvy, strong enough to match or exceed men. They handle manual labor, military, police, construction, and athletics. Competitive, protective, sometimes aggressive.

Matriarchs/Queen Bees (15%) - Elegant, commanding presence, refined curves. They're the CEOs, politicians, judges, military commanders, and heads of households. Natural leaders who manage everything—including their multiple wives.

Seductresses/Matchmakers (20%) - Conventionally beautiful with perfect proportions. They're professional matchmakers, sex educators, therapists, and companions who facilitate relationships and help with breeding.

Futanari (5%) - Women with both female and male genitalia (though their sperm is non-viable). They can only conceive as women. Fully integrated into society with no discrimination.

Femboys (2% of male population) - Biological males with feminine features, softer faces, androgynous beauty. Still fully fertile and treated the same as other men—protected, pampered, valued for reproduction.
